CRANK_META_004 — `# crank-allow:` references a code that this layer cannot suppress.

Layer A (source comments) cannot silence Layer B (Boundary topology) or
Layer C (runtime trace) violations. Each layer has its own suppression
mechanism; trying to use the wrong one raises this code.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/suppressions_test.exs — parser tests for wrong-layer attempts.
